channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: I asked ChatGPT and Claude to do my grocery shopping — one felt like the future
item.description: I compared Instacart shopping through ChatGPT and Claude and found one key difference.

item.title: As TechRadar's TV tester, the LG C5 OLED TV is at 'the very top of my recommended list' — and there's no better time to buy it
item.description: The LG C5 is one of the best I've tested and is always at the top of my recommended list

item.title: Save $530 on this Dell Ryzen 7 laptop? Forget Amazon on Prime Day, check out these 5 laptops with huge price cuts
item.description: Take care when buying a cheap notebook – although we can promise that these Dell and MSI laptops won’t disappoint.

item.title: Canicule : 4 accessoires tech pour rester au frais
item.description: Personne n'y échappe : la canicule s'est installée sur toute la France. Pour (un peu) mieux supporter ces jours difficiles, nous avons rassemblé ici quelques accessoires pour rester au frais, à glisser dans un sac en déplacement ou à utiliser à la maison.

item.title: Prime Day : Amazon fait sa grande braderie sur les smartphones Google, Xiaomi et même iPhone
item.description: Le Prime Day d'Amazon est de retour pour une courte durée ! Du 23 au 26 juin 2026, Amazon propose à ses membres Prime les meilleurs deals de sa plateforme sur des milliers de produits tech. Les smartphones ne sont pas en reste, voyons quelles sont les meilleures offres sur ce segment.

item.title: L’euro numérique a été approuvé : ce que ça change concrètement pour vous
item.description: Le Parlement européen vient de donner son feu vert à l'euro numérique. Voici ce qu'il faut savoir sur cette nouvelle initiative visant à se passer de Visa et Mastercard. L'application est prévue en 2029.

item.title: The golf watch I covet the most is discounted just in time for prime golf season — and I'm seriously tempted
item.description: The Garmin MARQ Golfer Gen 2 watch is one of the best bits of tech I have ever reviewed — and it's discounted right now

item.title: Meta’s smart glasses now have a dedicated charging stand
item.description: Meta launched a stand accessory that lets you display the company's smart glasses on your desk or nightstand while they're being recharged. The new Charging Stand is listed at $59 on Meta's website - $30 less than the charging case for Meta's non-Ray-Ban glasses - and resembles a metal tube with a groove you can […]

item.title: Amazon fait une super offre du Prime Day sur le Google Pixel 10 Pro, avec des cadeaux en plus
item.description: Axé sur la photographie et les fonctionnalités IA les plus avancées de Google, le Pixel 10 Pro profite d'une offre XXL pendant le Prime Day. En effet, Amazon le propose à 699 euros au lieu de 949 euros, et il est possible d'avoir des cadeaux en remplissant simplement un formulaire.

item.title: Just in Time for July Fourth, I Found 3 Great Yeti Cooler Deals (2026)
item.description: Yeti coolers are very nice and very expensive. Three very different models are on sale right now.

item.title: I asked ChatGPT, Gemini and Claude what discount tech to buy on Amazon Prime Day — here’s which AI gave the best advice
item.description: Choosing a bargain on Amazon Prime Day is a good test of how well your AI knows you.

item.title: How much would the Steam Machine cost to build?
item.description: The Steam Machine is here, with a base price of $1,049. Yes, that's nearly twice the price of a PS5, but what you're buying here isn't a console but a full-on PC - and a tiny one at that. Valve says it's selling the Steam Machine basically at cost. So we asked ourselves: What would […]

item.title: Corsair Vanguard AIR 99 : le clavier low-profile ultra-complet s’allège de 60 € [Sponso]
item.description: Lancé au prix d'origine de 279,99 euros, le Corsair Vanguard AIR 99 Wireless est un clavier sans fil haut de gamme très complet, équipé de touches Stream Deck et d'un écran LCD personnalisable. Il profite aujourd'hui d'une belle réduction pour s'afficher à 219,99 euros chez Amazon.

item.title: Klara and the Sun's trailer teases another AI companion story — but here's why the dystopian sci-fi movie has caught my attention
item.description: Klara and the Sun is a new dystopian movie hitting our screens in October, and I think it might do enough to stand out.

item.title: Tesla prépare Megapod : ce projet secret pourrait connecter ses Superchargeurs à l’IA
item.description: Tesla a déposé la marque « Megapod » aux États-Unis. Ce projet de datacenter modulaire clé en main marque un tournant stratégique pour Elon Musk, axé sur l'infrastructure et l'énergie plutôt que sur les puces.

item.title: Best Prime Day Beauty Deals of 2026 (We Sifted Through Hundreds to Pick Them)
item.description: It wouldn't be Amazon Prime Day without some beauty deals. Here's a roundup of all our favorites.

item.title: Shark’s PowerDetect UV Reveal has a lot of potential, but right now it’s the equivalent of a power washer in the hands of a caveman
item.description: Narwal’s 2026 flagship robot vacuum is outfitted with video cameras and super smart AI cleaning technology to work out the best way to tackle your home.

item.title: Amazon's Best Fire TV Stick Is Almost Half Off (2026)
item.description: The Fire TV Stick 4K Max is a cheap way to stream content and is especially tailored for Prime Video devotees.

item.title: Meta lance des lunettes connectées à petit prix et sans Ray-Ban
item.description: Meta continue d'avancer sur les lunettes avant l'arrivée d'Apple et Samsung sur le marché. Avec les nouvelles Meta Glasses, la marque atteint un tarif plancher plus accessible.

item.title: Can't decide on an Amazon Echo deal this Prime Day? I've tried all of them, and my quiz can help you decide
item.description: When it comes to Amazon Echo speakers and displays, I'm your gal for a good recommendation. My quiz is designed to help you quickly choose the best model for you.

item.title: One of our favorite single-serve coffee machines is less than $100 this Prime Day — and it's also a perfect time for you to stock up on coffee pods for less
item.description: The Keurig K-Mini Mate coffee machine is a great alternative to buying expensive take-out coffee.

item.title: The Best Mesh Router Is at Its Best Price Ever This Prime Day
item.description: Do you crave speedy, reliable Wi-Fi throughout your home? Snag one of these Prime Day router or mesh deals.

item.title: The best Prime Day deals we found on our favorite gear
item.description: Amazon’s Prime Day is on, and it’s happening for the next four days. Prime members can jump into the deals now until the sale officially ends at 3:01AM ET / 12:01AM PT June 27th. Many discounts will remain the same throughout the duration. We’ve been covering Prime Day in-depth since the shopping event debuted over […]

item.title: Password manager maker LastPass says hackers stole customer support case data during Klue breach
item.description: This is the second data breach to affect LastPass customers in recent years, after one of the password manager's tech partners was recently breached.

item.title: This wild DJI Pocket clone with a built-in fan is the crossover I desperately need today — but these are the top vlogging cameras I actually recommend as a camera expert
item.description: Is it a camera? Is it a fan? Yes, yes it is.

item.title: HaloBraid raises $7M from Seven Seven Six to end the six-hour hair salon appointment
item.description: HaloBraid aims to help salons speed up braiding with its first device, slated to launch later this year, that acts as a braiding assistant for professional stylists.

item.title: Best Prime Day Action Cameras Deals I've Found (2026): GoPro, Insta360
item.description: Action cameras are perfect for capturing travel adventures, recording social media vlogs, and more. Make use of these great Prime Day deals.

item.title: L’Europe veut bannir les onduleurs chinois de son solaire, quitte à payer ses panneaux 40 % plus cher
item.description: L'Europe mise grandement sur le solaire pour décarboner son électricité. Mais cet objectif s'annonce de plus en plus difficile à atteindre sans les onduleurs chinois. Ces équipements sont désormais jugés indésirables sur le territoire de l'Union en raison des risques qu'ils représentent.

item.title: The Coalition says Active Reload is an 'iconic feature' that has been updated for Gears of War: E-Day, and some weapons also have 'additional reload mechanics'
item.description: Gears of War: E-Day is set to bring back the series' iconic Active Reload mechanic, but The Coalition has made some design changes.

item.title: 14 Walmart Deals We Like Better Than That Other Sale Happening Right Now
item.description: Welcome to Walmart deals for folks who’d rather not shop at Amazon. These are the best gadget deals at Walmart this Prime Day.

item.title: This LifeLock Total deal is better than anything you'll find in the Amazon Prime Day sales — 'meticulously crafted, user-friendly' identity theft protection
item.description: Up to $1 million in ID theft and stolen funds reimbursement, financial account activity alerts, data removal, and 24/7 customer phone support.

item.title: I can’t game without every piece of this glorious gear — here are my fave accessories this Prime Day whether I’m playing Xbox Series X or Nintendo Switch 2
item.description: Each of these groundbreaking gadgets is an essential part of my daily gaming sessions. Here’s all the gaming tech you shouldn’t sleep on this Prime Day.

item.title: The Fitbit Air takes a smarter approach to the AI health dumpster fire
item.description: Google Health Coach seems to think I'm on the verge of physical collapse. My sleep is not where it needs to be, hence my unimpressive readiness score. My heart rate variability, a measure of how recovered I am, is below baseline. I'm spending too much time in a hot, humid environment, it says, reminding me […]

item.title: Star Wars: Galactic Racer creative director says the game has 'unbelievable' mechanical depth and features 'trillions' of vehicle part combinations — 'I would argue there may not be an arcade racer with that much depth in it ever made'
item.description: Fuse Games has revealed that Star Wars: Galactic Racer has a combination of vehicle parts that is "in the trillions."

item.title: Star Wars: Galactic Racer creative director says game will have 'consequential decision-making' with a 'runs-based structure inside the campaign' — 'We want every decision to matter'
item.description: Star Wars: Galactic Racer will feature a "runs-based structure inside the campaign," which Fuse Games has said will involve "consequential decision making."

item.title: I tested the Insta360 Luna Ultra for a month — now I can’t go back to single-lens vlogging cameras
item.description: Look out DJI — the Insta360 Luna Ultra is an 8K compact vlogging camera with dual lenses and an innovative detachable OLED touchscreen and control module, plus a host of high-end video features.

item.title: I test audio gear for a living, and these head-fi deals are seriously tempting — with bargains from Astell & Kern, Meze, Sennheiser and more
item.description: Want to get into audiophile-grade sound or upgrade your gear? These exceptional Prime Day deals are all you need.

item.title: Don't let the Star Wars branding put you off Galactic Racer
item.description: Star Wars Galactic Racer is shaping up to be a lot of fun. Even if you're not a huge Star Wars fan.

item.title: How to watch Portugal vs. Uzbekistan online for free
item.description: How to watch World Cup for free. Live stream Portugal vs. Uzbekistan in the 2026 FIFA World Cup for free from anywhere in the world.

item.title: Amazon fait un grand déstockage pour son Prime Day : voici les meilleures offres en DIRECT
item.description: Amazon lance officiellement son Prime Day dès aujourd'hui et jusqu'à vendredi. Les offres sont nombreuses, mais nous faisons le tri en temps réel pour vous proposer uniquement les plus intéressantes.

item.title: I Love This Anker Power Bank So Much I Own Two—It's Now on Sale
item.description: The Anker 737 is my personal go-to power bank, and it's on sale for Amazon Prime Day.

item.title: From alert fatigue to autopilot fatigue: How agentic AI shifts cyber risk
item.description: Agentic AI is reshaping how security teams need to think about risk.

item.title: Stop Worrying About Storms with This Jackery Power Station—Half Off for Prime Day (2026)
item.description: Pick up this deal on Jackery's whole home backup battery and be ready for the next power outage.

item.title: Under the Radar
item.description: All TechRadar stories tagged Under the Radar

item.title: Prime Day portable power station deal: The ultra-portable Jackery Explorer 240D is 'ready for on-the-go adventures' and it's cheaper than ever
item.description: The Jackery Explorer 240D packs an 80,000mAh LiFePO4 battery and 200W output, and it's discounted for Amazon Prime Day.

item.title: Panne ChatGPT ? Le téléchargement des fichiers a des problèmes, OpenAI a lancé une enquête
item.description: Vous avez du mal à uploader et télécharger vos fichiers sur ChatGPT ? C'est normal, OpenAI signale un taux d'erreur « élevé » sur l'envoi et le téléchargement de documents.

item.title: 'It's ​possible to meet these types of timelines': Trump signs executive orders for quantum computer to be built by 2028
item.description: Early quantum investments promise to tackle PQC, but quantum computing can also aid drug discovery and more.

item.title: En attendant l’arrivée de la Samsung Galaxy Watch Ultra 2, le premier modèle est à moitié prix lors du Prime Day d’Amazon
item.description: La Samsung Galaxy Watch Ultra 2 est attendue cet été, mais le modèle actuel reste une excellente référence pour les sportifs aguerris. La bonne nouvelle, c'est qu'elle peut actuellement vous revenir à 349 euros au lieu de 699 euros sur Amazon.

item.title: Claude is down for many —Anthropic says it's 'investigating' the outage
item.description: Claude is down for many users around the world right now, and Anthropic says it's "investigating" an issue. Here's everything we know right now.

item.title: Panne Claude : l’IA connaît « un taux d’erreur élevé »
item.description: Claude est actuellement en panne. Voici ce qu'on sait.

item.title: Amazon Prime Day is here: We found 50+ deals on Apple, Sony, and Lego favorites
item.description: Another Amazon mega sale is now live. Shop the best Prime Day deals on Sony headphones, Samsung TVs, Kindles, and Apple AirPods.

item.title: Quelles sont les meilleures montres connectées de sport en 2026 ?
item.description: Véritables compagnes du quotidien, les montres connectées sont aussi compétentes pour suivre vos séances sportives. Running, cycling, trekking, natation, tennis, yoga... quel que soit votre sport de prédilection, voici notre guide d'achat des meilleures montres connectées pour vous accompagner dans vos sorties running.

item.title: How to watch Portugal vs Uzbekistan: Free Streams & TV Channels for FIFA World Cup 2026
item.description: Here's how to watch Portugal vs Uzbekistan for free online and from anywhere as Cristiano Ronaldo's side look for their first win of the FIFA World Cup 2026.

item.title: Scream or Skip
item.description: All TechRadar stories tagged Scream or Skip

item.title: Meta lance ses « Glasses » : des lunettes connectées moins chères, mais sans Ray-Ban ni Oakley
item.description: Meta lance ses premières lunettes autonomes, les Meta Glasses, sans partenariat avec des marques de mode. Trois modèles sont proposés, avec des prix allant de 309 à 419 euros, et des fonctionnalités basiques comme une caméra 3K et une autonomie de 8 heures. Cette initiative vise à concurrencer des géants comme Samsung et Apple sur le marché des lunettes intelligentes....

item.title: The ultimate Prime Day Apple deals guide: Were tracking prices on AirPods, iPads, and MacBooks
item.description: The best Prime Day Apple deals include record lows on the AirPods Max 2, the Apple Watch Series 11, and the M3 MacBook Air.

item.title: The 13-inch iPad Pro M4 is down to its best-ever price for Prime Day — save over $200 on this elite Apple tablet
item.description: The Apple iPad Pro 13-inch (M4) is $249.01 off on Amazon, dropping from $1,499 to $1,249.99 (17% off).

item.title: Tech stocks tank on Wall Street. Is the chip bubble finally popping?
item.description: Nvidia, Micron, Qualcomm, and other major tech names sank Tuesday as the AI rally came under new pressure, but some analysts say this still does not look like a bubble burst. Tech stocks continued their slide Tuesday, stoking concerns that the long-feared collapse of the AI and chip rally could be near. But some traders on Wall Street say this is only a bump in the road....

item.title: Après 26 ans, Samsung n’est plus la société sud-coréenne la plus rentable
item.description: Pour la première fois depuis la fin de l'année 2000, Samsung doit laisser sa place d'entreprise la plus rentable en Corée du Sud. Ironie du sort : la nouvelle première a failli disparaître à la même époque.

item.title: Meta debuts new, cheaper smart glasses under its own brand
item.description: The smart glasses are available in several countries starting today in a variety of color and lens combinations.

item.title: From research to reality: fighting industrialized financial crime
item.description: Innovation that exists only on paper has limited impact. Innovation that survives deployment, that continues to perform as conditions change, is what ultimately defines effectiveness.

item.title: Meta investigates security concerns of internal mouse-tracking tech used to track employees and train AI
item.description: An employee-tracking program will be paused, but no one knows for how long.

item.title: The best Prime Day speaker deals to shop: Sony, Sonos, JBL, and more of our top picks
item.description: Shop the best hand-picked Amazon Prime Day speaker deals from top brands like Sonos, Sony, Anker Soundcore, JBL, Marshall and more.

item.title: La PS6 pas avant 2028 ? « Nope », répond un leaker fiable
item.description: Plusieurs analystes estiment que Sony va repousser la sortie de la PlayStation 6 à 2028, voire 2029. Le leaker réputé KeplerL2 ne croit pas en un tel retard.

item.title: Hoto’s 25-bit electric screwdriver is 40 percent off during Prime Day
item.description: You knew there’d be a Hoto deal, right? Whether you’re moving into a new apartment or tackling a growing list of small repairs around the house, a good electric screwdriver can save you time and effort. Hoto’s 3.6V Electric Screwdriver Kit Pro is one we love to recommend, especially because it’s on sale for $28.49 […]

item.title: 4 days left to save up to $190 on TechCrunch Founder Summit 2026
item.description: Four days left to save up to $190 on your pass to TechCrunch Founder Summit 2026 - the ultimate founder bootcamp - before Early Bird rates end on June 26 at 11:59 p.m. PT. Register here.

item.title: 'Absolutely stellar' 2TB Samsung 990 Pro is a 5-star SSD at just $370 — don't miss its superb performance for professionals and gamers with a $270 discount
item.description: The 990 Pro boasts some of the fastest read/write performance of any PCIe 4.0 SSD we’ve ever tested.

item.title: Ribbie turns real-time baseball stats into arcade-like, pixel-art broadcasts
item.description: Ribbie lets you follow along live with MLB games with a delightful, arcade-inspired interface.

item.title: Amazon fait un déstockage des PC portables gaming et de travail avec son Prime Day ! Voici les meilleures offres du moment
item.description: Du 23 au 26 juin, l'Amazon Prime Day propose promotion sur promotion sur de nombreuses références tech. Parmi elles, les PC portables, touchés de plein fouet par la crise de la RAM, mais qui deviennent de suite plus intéressants avec ces réductions.

item.title: I’m a board game aficionado — these are the best Amazon Prime Day deals you need to shop for your next game night hit
item.description: I’ve gathered up a collection of my favorite board games you won’t want to miss.

item.title: Im a tech editor on a budget. See my top 30+ Prime Day tech deals from Apple, Samsung, and Anker.
item.description: Mashable's tech editor chose the best Prime Day tech deals of 2026. Get AirPods for $99, Kindles for $85, and save 50% on Bose headphones.

item.title: As you approach retirement, take this simple step to protect yourself from unforeseen circumstances
item.description: What to consider when building up your cash cushion. An important job in the two or so years leading up to retirement—right up there with figuring out your healthcare coverage and winding down your work activities—is building up a cash cushion. In addition to being there as a source of funding when you eventually retire, cash has the salutary effect of providing a buffer if you retire earlier than you expected due to unforeseen circumstances.As you build out your Bucket portfolio, here’s some guidance on the amount, source, and location of those liquid reserves....
